examples: In October, I will teach a class on Epistemology.
If we draw there's this clear distinction between epistemology and metaphysics.
Here, I want on this question, from the epistemology Angle, to propose my some views.
These questions take us to the brave new world of Epistemology, Ontology, Information and Security Architecture, the ubiquitous GUIs, context searches, and so on.
Epistemology sounds complicated, in the abstract, but what digital technology has enabled are platforms through which we can build mental models and play with them.
